'''Trellar Yagen''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bovo Yagen system/Legends|Bovo Yagen system]]. It was covered in [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] and had a hot climate. It hosted a wide range of flora and fauna, much of it [[Diet/Legends#Carnivorous|carnivourous]]. The most famous predator on the planet was the [[Trell (creature)|trell]].<ref name="CTD" />

Due to the [[Bovorian]]'s sensitive hearing, heavy industry was banned on their home planet. This lead to Trellar Yagen being the base of operations for the mining and processing activity in the system.<ref name="CTD" />
